name: Bingxuan Zhao
title: Ph.D. Candidate in Computer Science and Engineering
motto: Exploring the unseen world through the lens of algorithms and data.
bio: Focusing on Computer Vision, Generative AI, and Remote Sensing. Dedicated to exploring the boundaries of robust image translation and generation.
currentFocus: Generative modeling for remote sensing imagery
researchStatement: My current work investigates how generative models and robust visual representations can support trustworthy translation, synthesis, and interpretation of complex remote sensing imagery.
